subject: dautoalign4warp not working
body:
Hi all, 

I’m experiencing some troubles running dautoalign4warp. It works for some 
tilt series, and it doesn’t work for others. When dautoalign4warp doesn’t 
work, I get a folder named Position_X.AWF containing the following:

32K    configFiles
1.9G   detection
1.0K    info
80K     markersIntermediate
512    nominal.tlt
16K    workingMarkers.dms

After having a look at the log file in MATLAB, I spotted the warning 
messages attached. 

Finally, I have the following versions of: 

-       IMOD 4.11.6

-       Dynamo 1.1.520

-       MATLAB 2020b

Does anyone know how I can solve this issue or have any suggestions? 

Thank you very much! 

Best
Giulia
